creator: cmt@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 191355
update qmapshack to 1.11.0

qmapshack 1.11.0 has been released. update /see attached) is rather easy - a few new files, mostly from the integration of QMapTool.
stage-qa complained about missing USES=jpeg, so added that.

poudriere ok, and passed basic funciton test.
